description: Courier is a notification infrastructure service for sending product-to-user messages across email, SMS, push, chat, and in-app channels. It also provides tools for managing user profiles, preferences, templates, automations, and multi-tenant messaging.
summary: Courier exposes a REST API at https://api.courier.com, an MCP server at https://mcp.courier.com, and a `courier` CLI; all use a Courier API key, and Courier can also issue scoped JWTs for client-side Inbox/auth flows.
